name: research-report
description: Standalone HTML rendering of a research report: sourced findings, a grid of 2-4 option cards with pros/cons, and a highlighted recommendation with the key trade-off. Self-contained, zero-JS.

slots.description: Report title; used in <title> and the h1.
Small overline label, e.g. research area.
What you found — factual, sourced to specific files/locations.
What this option costs or risks.
The chosen option plus a one-sentence rationale.
What you're optimizing for vs. what you're giving up.
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.

shape.option[]: { label: string, name: string, pros: string, cons: string }
